title: Apache HTTPD Web Server Configuration
description: Configuration variables for deploying and configuring the Apache HTTP Server.

HTTPD_VERSION.description: Specific version of httpd to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

LIBSCRIPT_GLOBAL_INSTALL_METHOD.description: Global override for how software should be installed across all systems (e.g. system package manager vs downloaded binaries/from-source).

LIBSCRIPT_WINDOWS_PKG_MGR.description: Global package manager override for Windows targets (e.g. winget, choco).

HTTPD_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install HTTPD. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

HTTPD_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for HTTPD to listen on

HTTPD_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for HTTPD to listen on

HTTPD_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for HTTPD to listen on

WWWROOT_NAME.description: The primary domain or server name (ServerName) for Apache to bind to.

WWWROOT_PATH.description: The absolute path to the DocumentRoot directory.

WWWROOT_LISTEN.description: The HTTP port Apache should listen on (defaults to 80).

HTTPD_SERVICE_RUN_AS_USER.description: Windows local user account to run the Apache service under (leave empty for default).

HTTPD_SERVICE_RUN_AS_PASSWORD.description: Password for the Windows local user account (if applicable).

HTTPD_SERVICE_NAME.description: Custom name for the Windows Service (allows side-by-side installations).

LOGS_DIR.description: Directory where logs should be stored.

SERVE_FROM.description: Base directory or context path from which the service should be served.

LIBSCRIPT_VERSION.description: Specifies the version of the package to use.
